_license: Public corporate climate-commitment rosters (RE100, EV100, EP100 — Climate Group; First Movers Coalition — World Economic Forum; We Mean Business Coalition; LEAF Coalition). Each entry independently re-verified against the coalition's published member list and the company's own public disclosure. Cite original source URLs.
